# Contributing Guidelines

Contributions to this package are very welcome.

## Before you start

- Check existing issues and pull requests before starting work
- Keep changes focused on a single improvement or fix where possible
- Open an issue first for larger changes so the approach can be discussed

## Local development

There is a test site in the solution to make working with this repository easier.
It is configured to do an unattended install, so check `appSettings.json` for the login details.

## Pull requests

- Use clear commit messages
- Include a short description of what changed and why
- Add screenshots or short notes for backoffice UI changes when helpful
- Make sure the package still builds and the feature works as expected before submitting
